content:
Why we still  have automatically owner sign in? OWNER AUTHENTICATION CHANGE — MANUAL OWNER LOGIN REQUIRED

Requirement:

The Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically.

Implement the following:

1. Remove automatic owner auto-login.
2. Do not restore the owner session automatically when the app starts.
3. On app launch, always display the Owner Login screen if no active manual login exists.
4. Keep "Remember Me" OFF by default.
5. Clear all locally stored owner session tokens on logout.
6. After logout, the next app launch must require manual email + password.
7. Do not automatically reuse cached owner credentials.
8. Preserve normal member/investor sessions only if intended; this change applies specifically to the Owner account.
9. Add a "Sign Out" button that completely clears the owner session.
10. Verify on Android, iOS, Web, and Expo Go.

Acceptance tests:

✓ Fresh install → Owner Login screen appears.
✓ App restart → Owner Login screen appears until a manual login is completed.
✓ Logout → Owner session removed.
✓ Reopen app → Manual login required.
✓ No automatic owner authentication occurs.
✓ Admin HQ, Variables, Access Control, and IVX Owner AI remain protected until manual owner authentication succeeds.

Return:
- Files changed
- Commit SHA
- Deployment ID
- Live verification screenshots/logs
